text:
# Carcavelos Forecast – Thursday 16 April

**Clean 3m swell all day with light winds—perfect setup for a full session.**

The morning is your golden window. From 7–11am, expect 2.9–3.1m waves with super clean conditions (light northerly breeze, 5–7 km/h). Water temp sits at 13–14°C, so a 4/3 or 5/4 is essential. Conditions steadily build through dawn; if you're an early riser, 7am onwards is stellar.

Afternoon holds firm at 3m+ through 2pm, but wind picks up after 3pm (15–18 km/h NNW), making the face choppier. Water warms to 20°C by mid-afternoon though.

**Tips:** Grab the dawn patrol—no crowds, perfect peelers. Take a performance shortboard or mid-length; the consistent 11.5s period suits rippers. Avoid post-3pm unless you like bumpy conditions. Bring your thicker winter suit.
